title: For
description: Renders a list of items reactively. Items are keyed by reference. Only changed items update.
signature: For<T, U>(props: { each: MaybeAccessor<readonly T[] | undefined | null | false>; fallback?: MaybeAccessor<CReactNode>; keyFn?: (item: T) => any; children: (item: Accessor<T>, index: Accessor<number>) => U }): JSXElement
prop_each_desc: Reactive array to iterate over. Accepts a value or an accessor.
prop_fallback_desc: Optional content when the list is empty.
prop_keyfn_desc: Optional key function for stable item identity.
static_list_intro: The uptime monitor fans out one <0>HttpCheck</0> per configured target. <1>keyFn</1> pins each check to its URL, so the resource identity survives restarts and re-renders.
reactive_list_intro: The page writer passes an accessor as <0>each</0>: every HTTP request appends to the ledger, the list grows, and <1>For</1> mounts a new durable <2>Page</2> resource for the new slug only.
in_the_wild: Follow these lists in the <0>uptime-monitor walkthrough</0> and the <1>page-writer walkthrough</1>.
